title: The Erra Epic: God of Plague and War
description: The god Erra, bored and restless, deceives Marduk and unleashes devastating war and plague upon Babylon.
introduction: The god Erra, bored and restless, deceives Marduk and unleashes devastating war and plague upon Babylon.

translation.text: Erra said: 'I shall make the cities howl, I shall turn the places of the living into deserts.'
